payload.subject: Re: Parent & Baby Swim — Fall registration open
payload.body: hi! i'd love to hold a spot for the fall parent & baby swim. saturdays at 9:30 am works for us. let me know what info you need to confirm registration. thanks!

parsed.rationale: The email invites a reply to hold a spot, so drafting an opt-in response is the correct action, though confidence is moderate because no memory slice confirms the parent wants to join or that Saturday 9:30 AM is free.
